tool.name: Nexus Processor

param.name: config_json
param.label: JSON Configuration
param.help: A JSON file with run parameters including input_file. Overrides the individual parameters above when provided.

configfiles.configfile:
import json, sys with open(sys.argv[1]) as f: d = json.load(f) with open('_env.sh', 'w') as f: f.write('export INPUT_FILE="%s"
' % d.get('input_file', sys.argv[2])) f.write('export INCLUDE_EVENTS="%s"
' % str(d.get('include_events', sys.argv[3])).lower()) f.write('export INCLUDE_USERS="%s"
' % str(d.get('include_users', sys.argv[4])).lower()) f.write('export MAX_EVENTS="%s"
' % d.get('max_events', sys.argv[5])) f.write('export MAX_EVENTS_PER_FILE="%s"
' % d.get('max_events_per_file', sys.argv[6]))

tool.command: #if $config_json python '$parse_config_script' '$config_json' '$input_file' '$include_events' '$include_users' '$max_events' '$max_events_per_file' && . _env.sh && #else export INPUT_FILE='$input_file' && export INCLUDE_EVENTS='$include_events' && export INCLUDE_USERS='$include_users' && export MAX_EVENTS='$max_events' && export MAX_EVENTS_PER_FILE='$max_events_per_file' && #end if mkdir output && ln -s "\$INPUT_FILE" ./input.nxs.h5 && echo "running nexus-processor..." && nexus-processor ./input.nxs.h5 --output-dir output/ --max-events-per-file "\$MAX_EVENTS_PER_FILE" \$([ "\$INCLUDE_EVENTS" = "true" ] && echo "--include-events" || true) \$([ "\$INCLUDE_USERS" = "true" ] && echo "--include-users" || true) \$([ -n "\$MAX_EVENTS" ] && [ "\$MAX_EVENTS" != "None" ] && echo "--max-events \$MAX_EVENTS" || true) && tar -czvf '$out_gz' -C output .
